description: Tabular AutoGluon pipeline: load and split data, train and refit models, build leaderboard.

components.description: Load tabular data, sample, cleanse, split, and write train/validation outputs.

stages.description: Validate inputs, read source data, apply sampling, and cleanse the dataset.
Split into selection train/validation sets and write output CSVs.

components.description: Train AutoGluon tabular models, refit, evaluate on validation data, and render leaderboard.

stages.description: Load train/validation CSVs from the workspace.
Run AutoGluon model selection (fit) with presets and time limits.
Refit best models on combined data and write evaluation metrics.
Aggregate model metrics, rank models, and render leaderboard HTML.
